metadata.description: Org-wide engineering standards for GitHub Copilot CLI. Lists steer, which installs the same always-on engineering operating manual that the Claude Code marketplace ships — sourced from one set of rules so both surfaces stay in sync.

plugins.name: steer
plugins.description: An always-on engineering operating manual — stack defaults, monorepo layout, spec workflow, living documentation, issue-tracker integration, testing rules, Definition of Done, drift gates, secrets handling, and compliance-aligned delivery. On Copilot, the standards install as .github/copilot-instructions.md (generated from the same rules/ that Claude Code injects via a SessionStart hook); run /steer:init from Claude Code to install or refresh it.
